message:
test(core-crates): expand test suites across 13 core crates (+1,145 tests)

Comprehensive test expansion covering edge cases, serde roundtrips,
Display/Debug/Clone verification, error paths, and cross-type integration.

Crate-by-crate breakdown:
- fcp-audit: 251→347 (+96) — verify_chain scenarios, AuditError codes, filter logic
- fcp-registry: 256→338 (+82) — supply chain policy, signature formats, mock verifier
- fcp-ratelimit: 420→516 (+96) — backoff strategies, token bucket, sliding window
- fcp-streaming: 363→443 (+80) — SSE parsing, WebSocket frames, reconnect config
- fcp-testkit: 352→434 (+82) — log scan rules, mock server, tracing capture
- fcp-cbor: 368→448 (+80) — canonical serialization, schema hash, map sorting
- fcp-tailscale: 385→465 (+80) — identity attestation, ACL tags, error chains
- fcp-webhook: 357→437 (+80) — Ed25519 signatures, event routing, provider parsing
- fcp-protocol: 377→449 (+72) — session transcripts, control plane, symbol envelope
- fcp-crypto: 380→479 (+99) — AEAD nonces, HKDF derivation, Shamir splitting
- fcp-manifest: 438→527 (+89) — validation rules, SLSA levels, rate limit parsing
- fcp-oauth: 445→538 (+93) — PKCE verifiers, OAuth1 signatures, token lifecycle
- fcp-graphql: 451→566 (+115) — operation traits, schema caching, error mapping

All clippy clean with -D warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
